description_long: This object consists of five aluminum cans, each with a vibrant gradient color scheme ranging from yellow, pink, purple, blue, to green. The front of each can displays the brand name 'HEXA BERRY' in bold white letters, along with the phrases 'NO REAL BERRIES' and 'NO SUGAR.' The cans feature a metallic pull tab on top and are decorated with small fruit icons and playful graphics. The back of each can includes a detailed nutritional information panel, QR code, and additional product details. The surface of the cans is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving a premium feel. These cans are typical of single-serve juice beverages found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or convenience stores.
description: A group of five colorful, glossy aluminum juice cans labeled 'HEXA BERRY' with playful fruit graphics and detailed nutritional panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'HEXA BERRY' branding, flavor text, and vibrant gradient colors on each can.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the fruit icon graphics and the gradient color transitions on the sides of the cans.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the nutritional information panels, QR codes, and product details on each can.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the fruit icon graphics and the smooth, colorful surfaces of the cans.
